task: Block 13 — Driver fines → auto-deduction policies + drawer confirm/defer card
details: FineEntryForm.tsx: when a fine is logged (internal or DOT), prompt ONE payment vs SPLIT across N settlements and create driver_finance.auto_deduction_policies row (deduction_type=fine) via useAutoDeductionPolicies.

FinesDeductionsCard.tsx: standalone Settlement-tab child showing pending escrow deductions (confirm/defer via approvePendingEscrowDeduction/rejectPendingEscrowDeduction), active fine policies, current settlement lines, and completed policy history.
Reuses existing backend only: auto-deduction policies API, escrow-deduction-pending routes, settlement-deduction-cap net-floor roll-over (no new services).
Lane A Block 12 imports tabs/FinesDeductionsCard when wiring drawer stub → real component.

lane_a_integration.safety: Safety pages may adopt FineEntryForm for unified fine + policy creation
